item.name: Ghostfish
item.description:
Calling the shallow waters of the For'ard Cabins home, this wavekin appears all but translucent.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: The silver scales of this saltwater fish are highly reflective, endowing it with the illusion of transparency. Known to be inquisitive, it is often seen swimming to the surface when people are present.
